follow_on_slice.purpose: Empirical Phase 4 exit evidence capture after scaffold review passes.
deferred_artifacts: Run nested pan run feature-delivery for src/inbox/in/phase-4-dogfood-proof-bundle-index.md through all stages.
Run nested pan run feature-delivery for src/inbox/in/phase-4-intervention-probe.md through pause, resume, and abort.
Phoenix trace screenshot or export for the proof-index nested run.
Populated pause-resume-abort-evidence.json with state diffs, timestamps, and run-log event ids.
Supervisor ship-stage staging and tech-writer delivery report.
Human ratification request outcome and any ratified pancreator.yaml phase advance.
Conditional updates to AGENTS.md, docs/M1.index.md, and src/memory/active/current.md.

non_goals: Do not start Phase 5 M1 backlog delivery before Phase 4 ratification.
Do not redefine Phase 4 exit criteria.
Do not run nested feature-delivery workflows in this scaffold slice.
Do not import Phoenix traces or claim trace verification in this scaffold slice.
Do not populate pause, resume, and abort evidence as empirical proof in this scaffold slice.
Do not create src/inbox/out/ delivery-report copies in this scaffold slice.
Do not update pancreator.yaml, docs/M1.index.md, src/memory/active/current.md, or AGENTS.md in this scaffold slice.
Do not push, open a remote pull request, or commit.
Do not read, write, traverse, or cite src/inbox/notes/.
required_artifacts: Two nested dogfood inbox directives under src/inbox/in/.
One scaffold proof bundle under src/memory/features/us-1-dogfood-phase-4-exit/ with placeholders that identify deferred evidence.
One policy-compliance.json artifact documenting documentation-impact deferrals.
One implementation-report.md with validation command outcomes.
One test-report.md with prose-only N/A coverage accounting for the markdown-and-JSON scaffold slice.
